channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: ‘It is about choice — if you want to hear AI music or if you don't.’ One Spotify user got so frustrated with AI slop that they created an ‘AI blocker’, but it 'may violate Spotify's terms of service'
item.description: A Spotify user has built their own software that filters out AI-generated music from their listening experiences.

item.title: Amazon drops new Kindle deals ahead of Prime Day — but should you buy now or wait?
item.description: Both the Kindle Paperwhite and Kindle Colorsoft are on sale right now at Amazon, and while today's prices are good, there are reasons to consider waiting if you're a Prime member.

item.title: 'The mini-game is already in its final stages': Resident Evil Requiem director confirms DLC is imminent, but you need to make sure you've finished the game first
item.description: Resident Evil Requiem's first major DLC is fast approaching, and the game's producer and director have both urged players to finish the main story beforehand.

item.title: ExpressVPN makes a U-turn on its always-free password manager promise
item.description: ExpressVPN has quietly changed the terms for its ExpressKeys password manager, meaning you'll now lose the ability to add new passwords if you cancel your VPN subscription.

item.title: DJI’s new Mic Mini 2 adds colorful covers to help them blend in
item.description: Following the launch of the Osmo Pocket 4 earlier this month, DJI has announced a new version of its smallest wireless microphone system. The DJI Mic Mini 2 doesn't bring a lot of upgrades over the original that debuted in November 2024, but it does introduce a new swappable magnetic cover system so you can […]

item.title: Ted Lasso’s fourth season starts August 5
item.description: It turns out you can go back again, especially if you win a pile of awards, mint a crop of stars and turn a potentially obscure sitcom into Apple’s biggest hit. The iPhone maker has today announced Ted Lasso season four will debut August 5, with new episodes arriving every Wednesday through October 7. This time out, Ted and Beard have returned to Richmond to take over coaching its women’s team as it languishes in the second division. Ted Lasso wrapped up its initial three-season arc back in 2023, wrapping up its storylines in a fairly definitive manner. Despite this, Apple wanted to maintain o...

item.title: Trump administration is paying more companies to abandon offshore wind projects
item.description: The Trump Administration has signed deals with two major energy companies to abandon their respective offshore wind farms, with both firms agreeing to invest in oil and gas projects instead. The separate agreements were detailed in a press release from the Interior Department, which named Bluepoint Wind and Golden State Wind as the companies that have voluntarily agreed to end their current leases for a combined $885 million. Both firms have also said they don’t intend to pursue any new offshore wind projects in the US going forward. Bluepoint Wind is an early-stages wind farm located off the ...

item.title: Comment changer de navigateur sur Windows 11 ?
item.description: Edge est le navigateur par défaut de Windows 11. Si vous souhaitez le remplacer par un autre qui a vos préférences, cela est tout à fait possible. Voici comment changer de navigateur sur Windows 11.

item.title: UAE to Exit OPEC After Nearly 60 Years
item.description: On May 1, the United Arab Emirates will end its a 59-year membership in the oil consortium, allowing it to raise output during one of the most volatile energy markets in years.

item.title: Traeger debuts the Irontop, a more affordable gas-powered griddle
item.description: Traeger’s first non-pellet grills debuted in 2023. Jumping into the griddle craze, the company introduced the Flatrock series in a three-burner model — later adding the smaller, two-burner option. Now Traeger is back with two new griddles, the two- and four-burner Irontop, which actually offer more cooking area than their predecessors. Plus, these new griddles are more affordable, too. Traeger promises the Irontop models will offer fast preheating, precise temperature control, edge-to-edge heating and a durable construction. The cooking area has a food-safe, rust-resistant coating the company ...

item.title: 1 500 km d’autonomie et le plein en 3 minutes : j’ai vu la batterie électrique CATL qui va achever le moteur thermique
item.description: En Chine, j'ai vu les nouvelles batteries de CATL qui permettront aux voitures électriques d'atteindre les 1 500 km d'autonomie et de se recharger en 3 minutes. Pas dans le futur, non. Dès les prochains mois. Le moteur thermique prend un coup de vieux.

item.title: Musk and Altman go to court
item.description: The trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI is officially upon us. And it is going to be a mess. As the two sides fight over the early days of AI, who deserves credit and cash for what, and more, we're likely to spend the next few weeks hearing a lot of important people's secrets made […]

item.title: Apple introduces a cheaper option for App Store subscriptions
item.description: Apple is adding a new subscription option that lets app developers offer lower monthly pricing in exchange for a 12-month commitment.

item.title: Medtronic says ShinyHunters hackers stole around 9 million medical records in latest attack
item.description: Medtronic was removed from ShinyHunters' data leak site.

item.title: All the best Geekom mini PC deals worth buying in the sale — from office desktops to content creation workstations, these are the machines to choose based on our benchmark tests
item.description: Unbelievably, Geekom's Easter Sale is still running, but you'll need to act fast to get these discount mini computers.

item.title: Apple TV sets August release date for Ted Lasso season 4 — and the returning soccer comedy show's first trailer is like a warm hug on a cold, wet, and windy night in Stoke
item.description: Ted Lasso season 4's official release date and first trailer have been unveiled by Apple.

item.title: Amazon's Kindle Colorsoft Gets a Dark Mode (2026)
item.description: Amazon's color e-reader finally gets a dark mode.

item.title: A DOGE Affiliate Is Now in Charge of the US Government’s ID Platform
item.description: Greg Hogan will oversee Login.gov as the government seeks to integrate driver’s license and passport information into the service, making what one insider calls “a national ID.”

item.title: Usines au ralenti : la marque premium chinoise Hongqi va-t-elle relancer la production de Stellantis en Europe ?
item.description: Selon des informations relayées par Reuters, Hongqi, la branche premium du groupe chinois FAW, serait engagée dans des discussions avec Stellantis en vue de produire certains de ses modèles dans des usines européennes du groupe. Rien n'est signé, et les contours de l'accord restent flous, mais le dossier illustre assez bien dans quel état se trouve aujourd'hui l'industrie automobile en Europe. ...

item.title: Amazon frappe fort : l’Asus ROG Xbox Ally X voit son prix chuter de façon inédite
item.description: Toujours affichée à un tarif difficile à digérer, l’Asus ROG Xbox Ally X profite toutefois d’une remise intéressante sur Amazon. Une occasion rare de mettre la main sur cette console portable premium à un prix plus attractif.

item.title: Pénurie d’essence et de gazole : 5 applications pour trouver du carburant
item.description: Depuis le 28 février 2026 et le déclenchement des frappes israélo-américaines contre l'Iran, le marché pétrolier mondial a basculé. Le quasi-blocage du détroit d'Ormuz, par lequel transite environ 20 % du pétrole mondial, a déréglé toute la chaîne d'approvisionnement, et la France, qui importe 51 % de son gazole (dont 29 % du Proche-Orient), encaisse de plein fouet. Résultat à la pompe : un gazole qui a dépassé 2,20 €/L fin mars, du jamais-vu depuis 1985, et près d'une station sur cinq en rupture début avril. ...

item.title: Voici à quoi ressemblera le nouveau pylône électrique qui va transformer nos paysages
item.description: Les tempêtes et les actes de vandalisme auront bientôt beaucoup plus de mal à faire plier notre réseau électrique. RTE vient de dévoiler un tout nouveau modèle de pylône à haute tension, destiné à remplacer progressivement les structures vieillissantes qui parsèment nos paysages.

item.title: IT: Welcome to Derry creator teases an underrated Stephen King plot for season 2 — and I'm begging HBO Max to officially renew it
item.description: IT: Welcome to Derry season 2 could explore the 30s if it is officially renewed by HBO Max.

item.title: Geely arrive en France avec ce SUV électrique : voici le prix et l’autonomie du Geely E5
item.description: Geely débarque en France avec son SUV électrique E5, un modèle au gabarit familial, à la fiche technique solide et à la batterie innovante. Mais avec des tarifs démarrant à 37 990 euros et un réseau de distribution encore embryonnaire, le constructeur chinois aborde un marché saturé et ultra-concurrentiel, où l'argument du prix made in China ne suffit plus vraiment. ...

item.title: Trust by design: How much can you really trust your AI agent
item.description: As the UK pours millions into agentic AI, trust by design is the missing piece.

item.title: Top open source PyPI package with over 1 million downloads each month hacked to send out malware
item.description: This was not a case of stolen credentials, but rather of vulnerability exploitation.

item.title: Colorado's Anti-Repair Bill Is Dead
item.description: Colorado has led the US on legislation that ensures people can fix their stuff. Manufacturers tried to claw back that control, but ultimately failed—for now.

item.title: 25 years ago, Jeff Bezos said this is the best way to deal with stress. Science says he’s still right
item.description: Want to lower your level of stress? Take a page from the Bezos (and research) playbook. While it sounds silly, especially since I have a variety of construction skills, I lay awake some nights stressing about our stairs. We had gotten quotes for replacing the carpet on our stairs with white oak, but the average estimate, not including materials, was $10,000 per flight....

item.title: Moosend review 2026
item.description: Moosend combines strong email automation, 130+ templates, and an AI writer from $7/month. A solid pick for SMBs that want pro features without enterprise pricing.

item.title: App Store : vous pourrez payer vos abonnements annuels en 12 fois, une idée de génie d’Apple ?
item.description: Les abonnements annuels pourront être réglés en mensualités, partout dans le monde, sauf aux États-Unis et à Singapour. Le timing, en pleine offensive réglementaire, n'a rien d'un hasard.

item.title: Fake GPUs have gotten so good, even a repair expert was initially fooled by this scam Nvidia RTX 4090 — so be careful out there
item.description: 'This is the best scam I've ever seen': repair expert can't believe how good this fake Nvidia RTX 4090 GPU is.

item.title: Geely débarque en France : le géant derrière Volvo lance son offensive avec de très fortes ambitions et deux SUV
item.description: Après une arrivée dans plusieurs pays européens, le chinois Geely pose ses valises en France. Deux SUV font le déplacement, un électrique et un hybride, avec des objectifs de déploiement assez élevés.

item.title: Snapchat brings AI-powered conversational advertising to its app
item.description: Users will be able to chat with a brand's AI agent to do things like ask questions and get recommendations.

item.title: YouTube is testing an AI-powered search feature that shows guided answers
item.description: YouTube is rolling out the new AI search feature to Premium subscribers in the U.S. on an opt-in basis.

item.title: Proton VPN's promises post-quantum groundwork, Stealth for Linux, and slick new app releases
item.description: Proton VPN has unveiled its Spring/Summer 2026 roadmap, promising a major new WireGuard codebase, the Stealth protocol for Linux users, and advanced tools for its business clients. Here is everything you need to know about the upcoming upgrades.

item.title: Comment désynchroniser Google Photos de son smartphone ?
item.description: Sur la plupart des smartphones Android, Google Photos est l'application par défaut pour le stockage. Voici comment désynchroniser le logiciel de votre téléphone.

item.title: Voiture électrique : pourquoi le simple sel pourrait bientôt détrôner le lithium
item.description: Le marché des batteries est en train de changer. Finie la domination des systèmes lithium-ion souvent fragilisés par les tensions d'approvisionnement. Le sodium (sel), bien moins sujet à ces difficultés, entre en force.

item.title: You can’t scale connection
item.description: The brands that are standing out are those building trust and relationships. We’re in our optimization era: Increasingly connected, efficient, and, perhaps unsurprisingly, incapable of giving anything our full attention. But I don’t want to be optimized anymore. Algorithms predict what we’ll watch, AI generates what we’ll read, and marketing systems are built specifically to remove friction from discovery to purchase. Feeds blur together, and messages feel interchangeable. Connection—the thing marketing is supposed to create—has become exponentially harder to achieve....

item.title: How to watch Hacks season 5 online – stream FREE and from anywhere
item.description: The fifth and final season of Hacks is here, and you can find a number of ways to watch the hit comedy show online...

item.title: ‘The Oprah Podcast’ is headed to Amazon in a multiyear deal
item.description: The deal gives Amazon rights to Oprah’s talk show library, book club, and ‘Favorite Things’ franchises. Oprah Winfrey’s podcast is headed to Amazon.Winfrey’s production company, Harpo Entertainment, struck a multiyear deal to give Amazon-owned Wondery exclusive distributing and advertising rights to “The Oprah Podcast,” the companies announced Monday. Under the agreement, Winfrey’s podcast will expand to two new episodes a week starting this summer — and Wondery will distribute the show’s audio and video across Amazon platforms.Under the deal, Amazon has also obtained rights to the library of ...

item.title: How to watch King Charles III’s historic address to Congress live
item.description: With U.S.-U.K. tensions high, Charles will become only the second British monarch to address Congress. Here’s what to know. America has a big milestone birthday this year, 250 to be exact. What better way to mark the occasion than to have the monarchy we declared independence from over to celebrate?

item.title: CheckMarx admits it was hit by major cyberattack that saw data leaked onto Dark Web
item.description: CheckMarx confirms March 2026 attack did result in data theft.

item.title: Final Fantasy 14 is finally coming to Switch 2 just in time for the Evercold expansion, but you'll need to buy a separate subscription even if you play on another platform
item.description: Square Enix has announced Evercold, the sixth Final Fantasy 14 expansion launching in January 2027, alongside a Nintendo Switch 2 release, but there's a big catch.

item.title: DJI Mic Mini 2 vs DJI Mic Mini: tiny upgrade, massive price cut, but there’s a Mini 2S on the horizon which will add a key feature
item.description: The newly released DJI Lito X1 comes with a host of features and specs that make it our favorite beginner drone — but the DJI Mini 4K retains some appeal.
